pred_sql:
SELECT
  f.school_district,
  f.t_fed_rev
FROM FINREV_FED_17 AS f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 AS k
  ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
WHERE k.State = 'Wisconsin'
ORDER BY f.t_fed_rev DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT AVG(f.c14) AS avg_title1_fund
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
WHERE k.State = 'Virginia';

WITH math AS (
  SELECT
    state,
    AVG(average_scale_score) AS avg_math_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  WHERE average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY state
),
rev AS (
  SELECT
    k.State AS state,
    SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_federal_revenue,
    SUM(f.c14) AS title1_revenue,
    SUM(f.c25) AS child_nutrition_revenue
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
    ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
  GROUP BY k.State
)
SELECT
  m.state,
  m.avg_math_score,
  r.total_federal_revenue,
  r.title1_revenue,
  r.child_nutrition_revenue
FROM math m
LEFT JOIN rev r
  ON r.state = m.state
ORDER BY m.avg_math_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH rev AS (
  SELECT
    f.state_code,
    f.school_district,
    f.nces_id,
    f.yr_data,
    f.t_fed_rev,
    f.c14,
    f.c25
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
),
rev_long AS (
  SELECT state_code, school_district, nces_id, yr_data, 't_fed_rev' AS category, t_fed_rev AS revenue
  FROM rev
  UNION ALL
  SELECT state_code, school_district, nces_id, yr_data, 'c14' AS category, c14 AS revenue
  FROM rev
  UNION ALL
  SELECT state_code, school_district, nces_id, yr_data, 'c25' AS category, c25 AS revenue
  FROM rev
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    rl.*,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC NULLS LAST) AS rnk
  FROM rev_long rl
  WHERE revenue IS NOT NULL
),
latest_state_math AS (
  SELECT state, average_scale_score
  FROM (
    SELECT
      m.state,
      m.average_scale_score,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY m.state ORDER BY m.year DESC) AS rn
    FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
    WHERE m.average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT
  r.category,
  r.school_district,
  r.nces_id,
  r.yr_data AS revenue_year,
  r.revenue,
  k.State AS state,
  m.average_scale_score AS state_avg_grade8_math_score
FROM ranked r
LEFT JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON k.State_Code = r.state_code
LEFT JOIN latest_state_math m
  ON m.state = k.State
WHERE r.rnk = 1
ORDER BY r.category, r.revenue DESC, r.school_district;

SELECT state, AVG(average_scale_score) AS avg_math_score
FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
GROUP BY state
ORDER BY avg_math_score DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  f.school_district,
  k.State AS state,
  f.yr_data AS year,
  f.t_fed_rev,
  m.average_scale_score,
  (f.t_fed_rev * 1.0) / NULLIF(m.average_scale_score, 0) AS revenue_to_score_ratio
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
  ON m.state = k.State
 AND m.year = f.yr_data
WHERE f.t_fed_rev IS NOT NULL
  AND m.average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
  AND m.average_scale_score <> 0
ORDER BY revenue_to_score_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH revenue_by_state AS (
  SELECT
    f.state_code,
    SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_fed_revenue
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  GROUP BY f.state_code
), top_state AS (
  SELECT
    r.state_code,
    r.total_fed_revenue
  FROM revenue_by_state r
  ORDER BY r.total_fed_revenue DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  k.State AS state,
  t.total_fed_revenue,
  AVG(m.average_scale_score) AS state_average_score
FROM top_state t
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON k.State_Code = t.state_code
LEFT JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
  ON m.state = k.State
GROUP BY k.State, t.total_fed_revenue;

SELECT
  r.school_district,
  k.State AS state,
  r.yr_data AS year,
  r.t_fed_rev,
  m.average_scale_score,
  (r.t_fed_rev * 1.0) / m.average_scale_score AS rev_to_score_ratio
FROM FINREV_FED_17 r
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON r.state_code = k.State_Code
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
  ON m.year = r.yr_data
 AND m.state = k.State
WHERE r.t_fed_rev IS NOT NULL
  AND m.average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
  AND m.average_scale_score <> 0
ORDER BY rev_to_score_ratio ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH state_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    k.State AS state,
    f.state_code,
    SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_federal_revenue
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
    ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
  GROUP BY k.State, f.state_code
), min_rev_state AS (
  SELECT state, state_code, total_federal_revenue
  FROM state_revenue
  ORDER BY total_federal_revenue ASC
  LIMIT 1
), state_score AS (
  SELECT
    state,
    AVG(average_scale_score) AS state_avg_scale_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  WHERE all_students = 'All Students'
  GROUP BY state
)
SELECT
  m.state,
  m.total_federal_revenue,
  s.state_avg_scale_score
FROM min_rev_state m
LEFT JOIN state_score s
  ON s.state = m.state;

SELECT state,
       AVG(average_scale_score) AS avg_math_score
FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
WHERE all_students = 'All Students'
  AND average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY state
ORDER BY avg_math_score DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.school_district) AS unique_school_districts
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
WHERE k.State = 'Indiana';

SELECT k.State AS state,
       SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_federal_revenue
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
GROUP BY k.State
ORDER BY total_federal_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  k.State AS state,
  SUM(f.c14) AS total_title_1_funding,
  SUM(f.c25) AS total_child_nutrition_funding
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
WHERE k.State = 'Colorado';

SELECT
  year,
  state,
  average_scale_score
FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
WHERE state IN ('North Carolina', 'South Carolina')
ORDER BY state, year;

SELECT
  state,
  AVG(average_scale_score) AS avg_score
FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
WHERE state IN ('NC', 'NY', 'North Carolina', 'New York')
GROUP BY state
ORDER BY state;

SELECT DISTINCT commod
FROM sampledata15
WHERE commod IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY commod;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sample_pk) AS unknown_country_samples
FROM sampledata15
WHERE country IS NULL
   OR TRIM(country) = ''
   OR UPPER(TRIM(country)) IN ('UNKNOWN', 'UNK');

SELECT
  r.commod,
  MAX(r.concen) AS highest_residue
FROM sampledata15 s
JOIN resultsdata15 r
  ON r.sample_pk = s.sample_pk
WHERE s.year = '15'
GROUP BY r.commod
ORDER BY highest_residue DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY;

SELECT DISTINCT s.commod
FROM sampledata15 s
WHERE s.country IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(s.country) <> ''
  AND s.commod IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(s.commod) <> ''
  AND s.commod NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT s2.commod
    FROM sampledata15 s2
    WHERE (s2.country IS NULL OR TRIM(s2.country) = '')
      AND s2.commod IS NOT NULL
      AND TRIM(s2.commod) <> ''
  )
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  s.growst AS state,
  AVG(r.concen) AS avg_pesticide_residue
FROM sampledata15 s
JOIN resultsdata15 r
  ON r.sample_pk = s.sample_pk
WHERE s.growst IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(s.growst) <> ''
GROUP BY s.growst
ORDER BY avg_pesticide_residue DESC;

WITH per_sample AS (
  SELECT
    s.variety,
    s.sample_pk,
    SUM(COALESCE(r.concen, 0)) AS total_concen_per_sample
  FROM sampledata15 s
  JOIN resultsdata15 r
    ON r.sample_pk = s.sample_pk
  WHERE UPPER(s.commod) LIKE '%APPLE%'
    AND s.variety IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(s.variety) <> ''
  GROUP BY s.variety, s.sample_pk
)
SELECT
  variety,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_count,
  AVG(total_concen_per_sample) AS avg_total_pesticide_concentration_per_sample
FROM per_sample
GROUP BY variety
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_total_pesticide_concentration_per_sample DESC;

SELECT
  r.commod,
  MAX(r.concen / NULLIF(r.lod, 0)) AS max_concen_to_lod_ratio
FROM resultsdata15 r
JOIN sampledata15 s
  ON s.sample_pk = r.sample_pk
WHERE r.lod IS NOT NULL
  AND r.lod > 0
  AND r.concen IS NOT NULL
  AND r.concen > 0
  AND r.concen >= 10 * r.lod
GROUP BY r.commod
ORDER BY max_concen_to_lod_ratio DESC;

SELECT
  lab,
  COUNT(*) AS testing_count
FROM resultsdata15
WHERE lab IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY lab
ORDER BY testing_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY;

SELECT
  s.country,
  AVG(r.concen) AS avg_detected_concentration,
  MAX(r.concen) AS max_detected_concentration,
  COUNT(*) AS detection_count
FROM sampledata15 s
JOIN resultsdata15 r
  ON r.sample_pk = s.sample_pk
WHERE s.country IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(s.country) <> ''
  AND r.concen > 0
GROUP BY s.country
ORDER BY avg_detected_concentration ASC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT
  distst AS state,
  COUNT(*) AS distributed_samples
FROM sampledata15
WHERE distst IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(distst) <> ''
GROUP BY distst
ORDER BY distributed_samples DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT
  commod,
  MAX(concen) AS max_concentration
FROM resultsdata15
WHERE concen IS NOT NULL
  AND concen > 0
GROUP BY commod
ORDER BY max_concentration DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT year, month, day,
       (year || '-' || month || '-' || day) AS collected_date
FROM sampledata15
WHERE sample_pk = 3763;

SELECT state, COUNT(*) AS apple_samples_collected
FROM sampledata15
WHERE UPPER(commod) = 'APPLE'
  AND state IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY state
ORDER BY apple_samples_collected DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT
  growst AS state,
  COUNT(*) AS apple_samples
FROM sampledata15
WHERE UPPER(commod) IN ('APPLE', 'APPLES')
  AND growst IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY growst
ORDER BY apple_samples DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT commtype) AS product_class_count
FROM sampledata15;

SELECT country
FROM sampledata15
WHERE sample_pk = 6480
  AND country IS NOT NULL

SELECT r.confmethod
FROM sampledata15 s
JOIN resultsdata15 r
  ON r.sample_pk = s.sample_pk
ORDER BY (CAST(s.year AS INTEGER) * 10000 + CAST(s.month AS INTEGER) * 100 + CAST(s.day AS INTEGER)) DESC,
         s.sample_pk DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT
  lab,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sample_pk) AS sample_count
FROM resultsdata15
WHERE lab IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY lab
ORDER BY sample_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT r.testclass, COUNT(*) AS result_count
FROM resultsdata15 r
GROUP BY r.testclass
ORDER BY result_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT DISTINCT conunit
FROM resultsdata15
WHERE commod = 'PO'
  AND conunit IS NOT NULL;

SELECT r.mean AS mean_result_finding,
       COUNT(*) AS num_records
FROM resultsdata15 r
WHERE r.commod = 'AP'
GROUP BY r.mean
ORDER BY num_records DESC;

SELECT
  r.extract AS extraction_method,
  COUNT(*) AS method_count
FROM resultsdata15 r
WHERE r.extract IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.extract
ORDER BY method_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  lab,
  COUNT(*) AS num_tests
FROM resultsdata15
WHERE lab IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY lab
ORDER BY num_tests DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT r.lab
FROM resultsdata15 r
WHERE r.commod = 'AP'
  AND r.lab IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY r.lab;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sample_pk) AS samples_from_other_countries
FROM sampledata15
WHERE country IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(country) <> '';

SELECT s.commod,
       COUNT(*) AS detect_count
FROM sampledata15 s
JOIN resultsdata15 r
  ON r.sample_pk = s.sample_pk
WHERE r.concen > 0
GROUP BY s.commod
ORDER BY detect_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT
  s.growst AS state,
  COUNT(*) AS organic_sample_count
FROM sampledata15 s
WHERE s.growst IS NOT NULL
  AND s.claim IS NOT NULL
  AND UPPER(s.claim) LIKE '%ORG%'
GROUP BY s.growst
ORDER BY organic_sample_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT
  s.country,
  COUNT(*) AS import_sample_count
FROM sampledata15 s
WHERE s.country IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(s.country) <> ''
GROUP BY s.country
ORDER BY import_sample_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT r.commod,
       COUNT(*) AS test_count
FROM resultsdata15 r
GROUP BY r.commod
ORDER BY test_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT pestcode, COUNT(*) AS test_count
FROM resultsdata15
GROUP BY pestcode
ORDER BY test_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW WITH TIES;

SELECT DISTINCT AwayTeam
FROM football_data
WHERE HomeTeam = 'Omiya Ardija'
  AND Datetime >= '2018-01-01' AND Datetime < '2019-01-01';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS match_count
FROM football_data
WHERE Country = 'Spain'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Datetime) = 2010;

SELECT b.YEAR,
       b.DATETIME,
       b.COUNTRY,
       b.COMPETION,
       b.MATCH,
       b.DRAW_OPENING
FROM betfront b
WHERE b.DRAW_OPENING = (SELECT MAX(DRAW_OPENING) FROM betfront)
ORDER BY b.DRAW_OPENING DESC, b.YEAR DESC, b.DATETIME DESC;

SELECT
  YEAR AS year,
  COUNT(*) AS match_count
FROM betfront
GROUP BY YEAR
ORDER BY match_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS pinnacle_matches_with_betting_records
FROM football_data
WHERE PSH IS NOT NULL
   OR PSD IS NOT NULL
   OR PSA IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS matches_count
FROM football_data
WHERE B365H IS NOT NULL
  AND PSH IS NOT NULL
  AND B365H > PSH;

SELECT MAX(B365H) AS highest_home_losing_odds_bet365
FROM football_data
WHERE FTR = 'A'
  AND B365H IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_games_0_0_tie
FROM football_data
WHERE FTHG = 0
  AND FTAG = 0;

SELECT
  Country,
  League,
  COUNT(*) AS matches_with_referee
FROM football_data
WHERE Referee IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(Referee) <> ''
  AND Country NOT IN ('Scotland', 'England')
GROUP BY Country, League
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY matches_with_referee DESC, Country, League;

SELECT
  Season,
  Datetime,
  HomeTeam,
  AwayTeam,
  B365D AS Bet365_Draw_Odds
FROM football_data
WHERE Season = '2016/2017'
  AND (
    (HomeTeam = 'Swindon' AND AwayTeam = 'Millwall')
    OR (HomeTeam = 'Millwall' AND AwayTeam = 'Swindon')
  );

SELECT
  Country,
  SUM(CAST(Capacity AS REAL)) AS total_capacity_mwe
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Capacity IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(Capacity) <> ''
  AND Country IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(Country) <> ''
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY total_capacity_mwe DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  Country,
  SUM(CAST(NULLIF(Capacity, '') AS REAL)) AS total_capacity_mwe
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Country IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(Country) <> ''
  AND Capacity IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(Capacity) <> ''
GROUP BY Country
HAVING SUM(CAST(NULLIF(Capacity, '') AS REAL)) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY total_capacity_mwe ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  Country,
  COUNT(*) AS plant_count
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Country IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(Country) <> ''
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY plant_count DESC, Country
LIMIT 3;

SELECT
  Country,
  COUNT(*) AS nuclear_station_count
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(Country), ''), NULL) IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY nuclear_station_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  Country,
  COUNT(*) AS shutdown_station_count
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE (
  LOWER(Status) LIKE '%shutdown%'
  OR (OperationalTo IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(OperationalTo) <> '')
)
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY shutdown_station_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Name, Capacity
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Capacity IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(Capacity) <> ''
ORDER BY CAST(Capacity AS REAL) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS operating_nuclear_stations_in_france
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Country = 'France'
  AND Status = 'Operating';

SELECT
  ReactorModel,
  COUNT(*) AS plant_count
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE ReactorModel IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(ReactorModel) <> ''
GROUP BY ReactorModel
ORDER BY plant_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Country
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Name = 'Chinon-A3'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Name
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Country = 'Japan'
  AND Status = 'Operational';

WITH per_country AS (
  SELECT
    Country,
    MIN(date(OperationalFrom)) AS first_operational_date
  FROM nuclear_power_plants
  WHERE OperationalFrom IS NOT NULL
    AND trim(OperationalFrom) <> ''
  GROUP BY Country
), earliest AS (
  SELECT MIN(first_operational_date) AS min_date
  FROM per_country
)
SELECT pc.Country, pc.first_operational_date
FROM per_country pc
JOIN earliest e
  ON pc.first_operational_date = e.min_date
ORDER BY pc.Country;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS plant_count
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Country = 'Japan'
  AND Status = 'Preparation';

SELECT
  Name,
  Status AS current_situation,
  CAST(Capacity AS REAL) AS capacity_mwe,
  ReactorType,
  ReactorModel,
  OperationalFrom,
  OperationalTo
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Country = 'United States'
  AND Capacity IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(Capacity) <> ''
  AND CAST(Capacity AS REAL) = (
    SELECT MAX(CAST(Capacity AS REAL))
    FROM nuclear_power_plants
    WHERE Country = 'United States'
      AND Capacity IS NOT NULL
      AND TRIM(Capacity) <> ''
  );

SELECT MAX(CAST(Capacity AS REAL)) AS max_capacity_mwe
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE (Status = 'Operational' OR Status = 'In operation' OR Status = 'Operating')
  AND (ReactorType = 'Pressurized Water Reactor' OR ReactorType = 'PWR');

SELECT
  Country AS nation,
  COUNT(*) AS plants_under_construction
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Status IS NOT NULL
  AND LOWER(Status) LIKE '%construct%'
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY plants_under_construction DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  Country,
  COUNT(*) AS under_construction_plants
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE LOWER(Status) LIKE '%under%construct%'
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY under_construction_plants DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  Name,
  Country,
  Latitude,
  Longitude,
  ConstructionStartAt
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE ReactorType LIKE '%BWR%'
  AND ConstructionStartAt IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(ConstructionStartAt) <> ''
ORDER BY DATE(ConstructionStartAt) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  Country,
  SUM(CAST(Capacity AS REAL)) AS total_capacity_mwe
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Country IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(Country) <> ''
  AND Capacity IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(Capacity) <> ''
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY total_capacity_mwe DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Source, COUNT(*) AS source_count
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE Source IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(Source) <> ''
GROUP BY Source
ORDER BY source_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  ReactorType,
  AVG(CAST(Capacity AS REAL)) AS avg_capacity
FROM nuclear_power_plants
WHERE ReactorType IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(ReactorType) <> ''
  AND Capacity IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(Capacity) <> ''
  AND TRIM(Capacity) GLOB '*[0-9]*'
GROUP BY ReactorType
ORDER BY avg_capacity DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT *
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE = 'TX'
  AND STAT_CAUSE_DESCR = 'Campfire';

SELECT OWNER_DESCR, FIRE_SIZE
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE = 'OR'
  AND FIRE_YEAR = 2015
ORDER BY FIRE_SIZE DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT COUNTY
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE = 'WA'
  AND FIRE_YEAR = 2012
  AND COUNTY IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY COUNTY;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS arson_fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2010
  AND UPPER(STAT_CAUSE_DESCR) = 'ARSON';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT FIRE_YEAR) AS years_of_data
FROM Fires;

SELECT
  STAT_CAUSE_CODE,
  COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE STAT_CAUSE_CODE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_CODE
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT FIRE_YEAR, SUM(FIRE_SIZE) AS total_fire_acres
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR IS NOT NULL
  AND FIRE_SIZE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY FIRE_YEAR
ORDER BY total_fire_acres DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS missing_owner_name_count
FROM Fires
WHERE OWNER_DESCR IS NULL
   OR TRIM(OWNER_DESCR) = ''
   OR UPPER(TRIM(OWNER_DESCR)) IN ('NOT SPECIFIED', 'UNKNOWN', 'UNSPECIFIED', 'N/A', 'NA');

SELECT
  COUNTY,
  COUNT(*) AS recorded_burns
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2000
  AND COUNTY IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY COUNTY
ORDER BY recorded_burns DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(FIRE_SIZE) AS total_acres_burned
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE = 'NC'
  AND FIRE_YEAR = 2006;

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE = 'UT'
  AND FIRE_YEAR = 1997
ORDER BY FIRE_SIZE DESC, DISCOVERY_DATE ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE LOWER(COUNTY) = 'gloucester'
  AND FIRE_SIZE > 10;

SELECT STATE, COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY STATE
ORDER BY wildfire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT STAT_CAUSE_DESCR, COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE STAT_CAUSE_DESCR IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_DESCR
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  land_type,
  COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN OWNER_DESCR IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%US%' OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%U.S.%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%FOREST SERVICE%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%BUREAU%' 
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%NATIONAL PARK%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%FISH%WILDLIFE%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%BLM%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%FEDERAL%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%STATE%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%COUNTY%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%CITY%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%MUNICIPAL%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%TRIBAL%'
        OR UPPER(OWNER_DESCR) LIKE '%BIA%'
      THEN 'Public'
      ELSE 'Private'
    END AS land_type
  FROM Fires
) t
WHERE land_type IN ('Public','Private')
GROUP BY land_type
ORDER BY fire_count DESC;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS wildfire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR = 2014
  AND STAT_CAUSE_DESCR = 'Campfire';

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(FIRE_SIZE), 0) AS total_acres_burned
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE = 'TX'
  AND FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010;

SELECT
  STATE,
  COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE STATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY STATE
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  STAT_CAUSE_DESCR AS cause,
  COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE STAT_CAUSE_DESCR IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY STAT_CAUSE_DESCR
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(COALESCE(FIRE_SIZE, 0)) AS total_area_burned_acres
FROM Fires;

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 1990 AND 1999 THEN '1990s'
    WHEN FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009 THEN '2000s'
  END AS decade,
  SUM(FIRE_SIZE) AS acres_burned
FROM Fires
WHERE FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 1990 AND 2009
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 1990 AND 1999 THEN '1990s'
    WHEN FIRE_YEAR BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009 THEN '2000s'
  END
ORDER BY decade;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS fire_cases_without_owner
FROM Fires
WHERE OWNER_CODE IS NULL
  AND (OWNER_DESCR IS NULL OR TRIM(OWNER_DESCR) = '');

SELECT
  lat_band,
  fire_count
FROM (
  SELECT
    (CAST(FLOOR(LATITUDE) AS INTEGER) || '–' || CAST(FLOOR(LATITUDE) + 1 AS INTEGER)) AS lat_band,
    COUNT(*) AS fire_count
  FROM Fires
  WHERE LATITUDE IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY FLOOR(LATITUDE)
)
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT
  id,
  groupId,
  groupName,
  groupYear AS releaseYear
FROM torrents
ORDER BY id;

SELECT
  artist,
  COUNT(*) AS entry_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(groupName, ' | ') AS entries
FROM torrents
GROUP BY artist
ORDER BY entry_count DESC, artist ASC;

SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM tags
WHERE tag IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(tag) <> ''
ORDER BY tag;

SELECT DISTINCT releaseType
FROM torrents
WHERE releaseType IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY releaseType;

SELECT
  artist,
  groupName,
  groupYear,
  releaseType,
  totalSnatched
FROM torrents
WHERE groupYear > 2000
ORDER BY totalSnatched DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT artist, groupName, groupYear, totalSnatched
FROM torrents
WHERE releaseType = 'album'
  AND totalSnatched > 100
ORDER BY totalSnatched DESC;

SELECT t.groupName, t.artist, t.totalSnatched
FROM torrents AS t
JOIN tags AS g ON g.id = t.id
WHERE LOWER(g.tag) LIKE '%houston%'
ORDER BY t.totalSnatched DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH artist_releases AS (
  SELECT groupName, totalSnatched
  FROM torrents
  WHERE LOWER(artist) = LOWER('lasean camry')
),
max_min AS (
  SELECT MAX(totalSnatched) AS max_snatches,
         MIN(totalSnatched) AS min_snatches
  FROM artist_releases
)
SELECT 'most_popular' AS popularity, ar.groupName, ar.totalSnatched
FROM artist_releases ar
CROSS JOIN max_min mm
WHERE ar.totalSnatched = mm.max_snatches

UNION ALL

SELECT 'least_popular' AS popularity, ar.groupName, ar.totalSnatched
FROM artist_releases ar
CROSS JOIN max_min mm
WHERE ar.totalSnatched = mm.min_snatches;

SELECT
  artist,
  groupName AS albumTitle,
  groupYear,
  totalSnatched AS popularity
FROM torrents
WHERE LOWER(releaseType) = 'album'
ORDER BY totalSnatched DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  tg.tag AS topic,
  SUM(tr.totalSnatched) AS total_downloads
FROM torrents tr
JOIN tags tg
  ON tg.id = tr.id
WHERE tr.groupYear >= 2010
GROUP BY tg.tag
ORDER BY total_downloads DESC;

SELECT
  groupYear,
  COUNT(*) AS release_count
FROM torrents
WHERE groupYear IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY groupYear
ORDER BY release_count ASC, groupYear ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT groupName, artist, groupYear, totalSnatched
FROM torrents
ORDER BY totalSnatched DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT artist, SUM(totalSnatched) AS total_snatches
FROM torrents
WHERE groupYear = 2015
GROUP BY artist
ORDER BY total_snatches DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT t.groupName AS release_title,
       g.tag AS tag
FROM torrents AS t
JOIN tags AS g
  ON t.id = g.id
ORDER BY t.groupName, g.tag;

SELECT
  groupYear AS year,
  COUNT(*) AS released_song_count
FROM torrents
WHERE groupYear IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY groupYear
ORDER BY released_song_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT artist, COUNT(DISTINCT groupId) AS release_count
FROM torrents
WHERE artist IS NOT NULL AND artist <> ''
GROUP BY artist
ORDER BY release_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT artist,
       AVG(totalSnatched) AS avg_downloads
FROM torrents
GROUP BY artist
ORDER BY avg_downloads DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  groupYear AS year,
  COUNT(*) AS cd_releases
FROM torrents
WHERE groupYear IS NOT NULL
  AND LOWER(releaseType) = 'cd'
GROUP BY groupYear
ORDER BY cd_releases DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT groupName, artist, groupYear, totalSnatched
FROM torrents
ORDER BY totalSnatched DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  releaseType,
  SUM(totalSnatched) AS total_downloads
FROM torrents
WHERE releaseType IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY releaseType
ORDER BY total_downloads DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  artist,
  SUM(totalSnatched) AS total_downloads
FROM torrents
WHERE artist IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY artist
ORDER BY total_downloads DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT totalSnatched AS downloaded_numbers, releaseType
FROM torrents;

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN groupYear BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009 THEN '2000s'
    WHEN groupYear < 2000 THEN 'Before 2000'
  END AS period,
  SUM(totalSnatched) AS downloaded_numbers
FROM torrents
WHERE groupYear IS NOT NULL
  AND (groupYear BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009 OR groupYear < 2000)
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN groupYear BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009 THEN '2000s'
    WHEN groupYear < 2000 THEN 'Before 2000'
  END
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN period = 'Before 2000' THEN 1
    ELSE 2
  END;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_duplicate_release_titles
FROM (
  SELECT groupName
  FROM torrents
  GROUP BY groupName
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) d;

SELECT artist, COUNT(*) AS cd_count
FROM torrents
WHERE artist IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(artist) <> ''
GROUP BY artist
ORDER BY cd_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT LOWER(releaseType) AS release_type,
       SUM(totalSnatched) AS total_downloads
FROM torrents
WHERE LOWER(releaseType) IN ('ep', 'album')
GROUP BY LOWER(releaseType)
ORDER BY release_type;

SELECT
  artist
FROM torrents
WHERE releaseType = 'CD'
GROUP BY artist
HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
ORDER BY artist;

SELECT DISTINCT artist
FROM torrents
WHERE groupYear > 2010
  AND artist IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY artist;

SELECT CrimeTS, COUNT(*) AS crime_count
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
GROUP BY CrimeTS
ORDER BY crime_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Outcome, COUNT(*) AS outcome_count
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
WHERE LOWER(Location) LIKE '%street%'
GROUP BY Outcome
ORDER BY outcome_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT "Type", COUNT(*) AS crime_count
FROM "GreaterManchesterCrime"
WHERE "Location" LIKE '%Salford%'
GROUP BY "Type"
ORDER BY crime_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_crimes
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime;

SELECT
  Location AS area,
  COUNT(CrimeID) AS crime_count
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
GROUP BY Location
ORDER BY crime_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT
  Type,
  AVG(CASE WHEN Outcome = 'Investigation complete' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS investigation_complete_rate,
  SUM(CASE WHEN Outcome = 'Investigation complete' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS investigation_complete_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
GROUP BY Type
ORDER BY investigation_complete_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Location, COUNT(*) AS drugs_crime_count
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
WHERE Type = 'Drugs'
GROUP BY Location
ORDER BY drugs_crime_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Type, COUNT(*) AS crime_count
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
GROUP BY Type
ORDER BY crime_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Location, COUNT(*) AS crime_count
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
GROUP BY Location
ORDER BY crime_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Location, COUNT(*) AS crime_count
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
GROUP BY Location
ORDER BY crime_count ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Location, COUNT(*) AS sexual_offences_count
FROM GreaterManchesterCrime
WHERE LOWER(Type) LIKE '%sexual%'
GROUP BY Location
ORDER BY sexual_offences_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT "Location", COUNT(*) AS crime_count
FROM "GreaterManchesterCrime"
GROUP BY "Location"
ORDER BY crime_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT "Type", COUNT(*) AS prosecution_cases
FROM "GreaterManchesterCrime"
WHERE LOWER("Outcome") LIKE '%prosecution%'
GROUP BY "Type"
ORDER BY prosecution_cases DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT "Type", COUNT(*) AS complete_cases
FROM "GreaterManchesterCrime"
WHERE "Outcome" ILIKE '%investigation complete%'
GROUP BY "Type"
ORDER BY complete_cases DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  votedby,
  COUNT(*) AS method_count
FROM hall_of_fame
WHERE yearid = 2000
GROUP BY votedby
ORDER BY method_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_id,
       p.name_first,
       p.name_last
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
WHERE pa.year = 2010
  AND pa.award_id = 'Rookie of the Year';

SELECT
  p.player_id,
  p.name_first,
  p.name_last,
  s.year,
  s.team_id,
  s.league_id,
  s.salary
FROM salary s
JOIN player p
  ON p.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE s.year >= 2010
  AND s.salary = (
    SELECT MAX(s2.salary)
    FROM salary s2
    WHERE s2.year >= 2010
  )
ORDER BY s.salary DESC, s.year DESC, p.name_last, p.name_first;

SELECT p.player_id,
       p.name_first,
       p.name_last,
       s.year,
       s.team_id,
       s.league_id,
       s.salary
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT player_id
      FROM hall_of_fame
      WHERE inducted = 'Y') hof
JOIN salary s
  ON s.player_id = hof.player_id
LEFT JOIN player p
  ON p.player_id = hof.player_id
ORDER BY p.name_last, p.name_first, s.year, s.team_id;

SELECT
  yearid AS year,
  MIN(CAST(needed AS INTEGER)) AS min_votes_needed
FROM hall_of_fame
WHERE yearid >= 1871
  AND needed IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(needed) <> ''
GROUP BY yearid
ORDER BY yearid;

SELECT
  year,
  team_id,
  player_id,
  salary
FROM salary
WHERE league_id = 'NL'
ORDER BY year, team_id, player_id;

SELECT year, team_id, player_id, salary
FROM salary
WHERE league_id = 'AL'
ORDER BY year, team_id, player_id;

SELECT
  p.birth_country,
  p.birth_state,
  p.birth_city,
  COUNT(*) AS award_count
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p
  ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
GROUP BY
  p.birth_country,
  p.birth_state,
  p.birth_city
ORDER BY award_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT
  p.birth_city,
  p.birth_state,
  p.birth_country
FROM hall_of_fame h
JOIN player p
  ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
  AND h.yearid >= 1871
ORDER BY p.birth_country, p.birth_state, p.birth_city;

SELECT DISTINCT pa.award_id,
       s.salary
FROM salary AS s
JOIN player_award AS pa
  ON pa.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE s.salary = (SELECT MAX(s2.salary) FROM salary AS s2);

SELECT DISTINCT yearid
FROM hall_of_fame
WHERE needed_note IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(needed_note) <> ''
ORDER BY yearid;

SELECT
  p.birth_country AS country,
  COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hall_of_famers
FROM hall_of_fame h
JOIN player p
  ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
  AND p.birth_country IS NOT NULL
  AND p.birth_country <> ''
GROUP BY p.birth_country
ORDER BY hall_of_famers DESC, country ASC
LIMIT 10;

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    pa.award_id,
    pa.year AS award_year,
    pa.player_id,
    p.name_first,
    p.name_last,
    (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS age_at_award,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY pa.award_id
      ORDER BY (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) ASC,
               pa.year ASC,
               pa.player_id ASC
    ) AS rn
  FROM player_award pa
  JOIN player p
    ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(p.birth_year) <> ''
)
SELECT
  award_id,
  player_id,
  name_first,
  name_last,
  award_year,
  age_at_award
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY award_id;

WITH winners AS (
  SELECT
    pa.award_id,
    pa.player_id,
    p.name_first,
    p.name_last,
    CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) AS birth_year,
    COALESCE(CAST(NULLIF(p.birth_month, '') AS INTEGER), 1) AS birth_month,
    COALESCE(CAST(NULLIF(p.birth_day, '') AS INTEGER), 1) AS birth_day,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY pa.award_id
      ORDER BY 
        CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) ASC,
        COALESCE(CAST(NULLIF(p.birth_month, '') AS INTEGER), 1) ASC,
        COALESCE(CAST(NULLIF(p.birth_day, '') AS INTEGER), 1) ASC,
        pa.player_id
    ) AS rn
  FROM player_award pa
  JOIN player p
    ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(p.birth_year, '') IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  award_id,
  player_id,
  name_first,
  name_last,
  birth_year,
  birth_month,
  birth_day
FROM winners
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY award_id;

SELECT
  s.team_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.player_id) AS hof_player_count
FROM salary AS s
JOIN hall_of_fame AS h
  ON h.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY s.team_id
ORDER BY hof_player_count DESC, s.team_id
LIMIT 10;

SELECT AVG(lifespan_years) AS avg_lifespan_years
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT
         h.player_id,
         CAST(p.death_year AS INTEGER) - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) AS lifespan_years
  FROM hall_of_fame h
  JOIN player p
    ON p.player_id = h.player_id
  WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
    AND p.birth_year IS NOT NULL AND p.birth_year <> ''
    AND p.death_year IS NOT NULL AND p.death_year <> ''
) t
WHERE lifespan_years IS NOT NULL;

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.weight AS NUMERIC)) AS avg_weight
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
WHERE p.weight IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(p.weight) <> '';

-- Cannot be answered with the provided schema because there is no position field in any table.
-- If there were a column like player.position, the query would be:
-- SELECT p.position,
--        COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_id) AS hof_award_winners
-- FROM player_award pa
-- JOIN hall_of_fame h
--   ON h.player_id = pa.player_id
--  AND h.inducted = 'Y'
-- JOIN player p
--   ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
-- GROUP BY p.position
-- ORDER BY hof_award_winners DESC

SELECT p.player_id,
       p.name_first,
       p.name_last,
       pav.award_id,
       pav.league_id,
       pav.year,
       pav.points_won
FROM player_award_vote AS pav
JOIN player AS p
  ON p.player_id = pav.player_id
WHERE pav.year = 1971
ORDER BY pav.points_won DESC, pav.player_id
LIMIT 1;

WITH hof AS (
  SELECT
    player_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN inducted = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ever_inducted
  FROM hall_of_fame
  GROUP BY player_id
)
SELECT
  p.birth_month,
  SUM(COALESCE(h.ever_inducted, 0)) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS likelihood_elected,
  SUM(COALESCE(h.ever_inducted, 0)) AS inducted_players,
  COUNT(*) AS total_players
FROM player p
LEFT JOIN hof h
  ON h.player_id = p.player_id
WHERE p.birth_month IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(p.birth_month) <> ''
GROUP BY p.birth_month
ORDER BY likelihood_elected DESC, total_players DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  league_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT player_id) AS awarded_player_count
FROM player_award
WHERE year = 2006
GROUP BY league_id
ORDER BY awarded_player_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_players
FROM (
  SELECT pa.player_id
  FROM player_award pa
  GROUP BY pa.player_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
) t;

SELECT p.birth_city, COUNT(*) AS player_count
FROM player p
WHERE p.birth_city IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(p.birth_city) <> ''
GROUP BY p.birth_city
ORDER BY player_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.weight AS NUMERIC)) AS avg_weight
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT player_id
  FROM player_award
  WHERE award_id = 'TSN All-Star' 
    AND notes = 'Third-Base Man'
) a
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = a.player_id
WHERE p.weight IS NOT NULL;

SELECT p.player_id,
       p.name_first,
       p.name_last,
       s.salary
FROM salary AS s
JOIN player AS p
  ON p.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE s.year = 2015
ORDER BY s.salary DESC
LIMIT 1;
